flavourText: Lurks in every equation, shifting forms with every operation. Solve for x before it solves for you.
A towering polynomial monstrosity. Factor it down piece by piece or be crushed by its complexity.
Roams the plane, drawing circles of destruction. Plot your approach carefully or lose your bearings.
Summons an endless army, each soldier stronger than the last. Find the pattern before you are overwhelmed.
Coils through all four quadrants. Only those who master every identity can break its cycle.
Grows exponentially stronger each turn. Use logarithms to cut it down to size.
Haunts every curve, hiding at stationary points. Find its rate of change before it vanishes.
Vast and formless, it fills the space beneath every curve. Sum its parts to reveal its weakness.
Never gives an exact answer, only closer and closer approximations. Converge on its weakness before it diverges into chaos.
Strikes from any angle in three dimensions. You must resolve its forces to find the path to victory.
Gathers data from every corner, but its methods are riddled with bias. Expose its flawed sampling to defeat it.
Sprouts a new head for every class interval. Read its frequency density correctly or be lost in the bars.
Claims to know every outcome. Untangle its conditions and prove that nothing is certain.
Hides within the normal distribution, perfectly symmetric and deadly. Standardise your attack to find its z-value weakness.
Insists there is no effect, no difference, no hope. Gather sufficient evidence to reject its claim.
Accelerates relentlessly, launching projectiles from every direction. Calculate its trajectory before impact.
Drags you down inclined planes and tangles you in pulleys. Resolve every force or be pulled apart.
Balances on a knife-edge, waiting for you to miscalculate. One wrong pivot and it all comes crashing down.
